name: Client-side data fetching (React/Next.js)
description: MEDIUM-HIGH: reduce redundant network work and listener duplication. Includes: SWR deduplication, passive listeners, global listener dedup, localStorage minimization/versioning.

metadata.intent: Optimize client-side data fetching and event subscriptions for responsiveness and correctness

must_use: Use passive listeners for scroll/touch where safe
must_not: Register N global listeners for N component instances
Store large/sensitive blobs in localStorage without versioning
conventions: Wrap storage reads/writes in try/catch (private mode/quota).

steps.description: Deduplicate global event listeners across component instances (single subscription, fan out to callbacks).
Use `{ passive: true }` for touch/wheel/scroll listeners that never call `preventDefault()`.
Prefer SWR for automatic request deduplication/caching across component instances.
Version keys and store minimal fields in localStorage; handle exceptions; include migrations when schema changes.
